name: Authenticated organisation profile slice
description: First vertical slice proving React protected route → session → TanStack Query → contract client → platform-api → permission guard → use case → domain → Postgres → structured logs/traces
notes: Real Keycloak login (ADR-ACT-0110) is NOT required for this slice. Use fixture SessionActor via LOCAL_FIXTURE_SESSION env var. Real SSO login is blocked until ADR-ACT-0110 is Done.
